phrases.text_local: Où est la promenade au bord du lac ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah proh-muh-NAD oh bor doo lak
phrases.cultural_note: The Ouchy waterfront has a scenic lakeside promenade stretching several kilometers — perfect for walks, jogs, or rollerblading.

responses.english: The promenade starts here and runs along the lake for several kilometers.
responses.phonetic: lah proh-muh-NAD koh-MAHNS ee-SEE ay lohnzh luh LAK soor plu-ZYUHR kee-loh-MEHTR
responses.local: La promenade commence ici et longe le lac sur plusieurs kilomètres.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry terminal is
phrases.text_local: Où est le quai des bateaux ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh KAY day bah-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: The CGN ferry terminal at Ouchy connects to Evian (France), Thonon, and other Lake Geneva towns.

responses.english: The CGN pier is at the end of the promenade, near the château.
responses.phonetic: luh KAY say-zhay-EN eh oh BOO duh lah proh-muh-NAD, preh doo shah-TOH
responses.local: Le quai CGN est au bout de la promenade, près du château.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the ferry to Evian
phrases.text_local: Comment aller à Évian en ferry ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MON ah-LAY ah ay-VYON on fer-EE
phrases.cultural_note: Passenger ferries cross to Evian (France) regularly — about 35 minutes each way. A great day trip with Swiss/French border views.

responses.english: Check the schedule at the CGN counter on the quay.
responses.phonetic: kon-sool-TAY layz oh-REHR oh gee-SHAY say-zhay-EN soor luh KAY
responses.local: Consultez les horaires au guichet CGN sur le quai.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des installations de plage ?
phrases.cultural_note: There's a small public beach at Ouchy with changing rooms and a diving board. The water is clean but can be cold (20°C max in summer).

responses.english: Yes, there's a public beach with changing rooms and a diving board.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah oon plazh poo-BLEEK ah-VEK day kah-BEEN ay uhn plohn-ZHWAHR
responses.local: Oui, il y a une plage publique avec des cabines et un plongeoir.

phrases.text_local: Comment accéder à Ouchy en transports publics ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MON aks-ay-DAY ah doo-SHEE on trahnz-POR poo-BEEK
phrases.cultural_note: Metro M1 goes directly to Ouchy from the central station (Gare). Buses also serve the waterfront area.

responses.english: Metro M2, stop Ouchy. Or bus 2 from the station.
responses.phonetic: may-TROH em DUH, ah-REH oo-SHEE. oo boos DUH duh-PWEE lah GAR
responses.local: Métro M2, arrêt Ouchy. Ou bus 2 depuis la gare.
